'''Oradin''' was a [[City/Legends|city]] on [[Brentaal IV/Legends|Brentaal IV]], located to the west of the city of [[Vuultin]]. Oradin contained a large [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]], [[Imperial-class spaceport|Imperial-class]]. Parts of the city were destroyed during the Battle of Brentaal IV between the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. A [[Gunship/Legends|gunship]] was shot down and smashed into a school during this battle.<ref name="XWING" /> The [[Grand Oradin Hotel]] was located in this city.<ref name="Revenge" />
